name: Feature request (Epic)
about: Propose a new feature or large enhancement (epic)
title: "Epic: <short description of the feature>"
labels: ["epic", "enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## ✨ Feature Summary

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see. -->

## 🤔 Problem / Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Why is it valuable? -->

## 💡 Proposed Solution

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->

## 📐 Scope & Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Acceptance criterion 1
- [ ] Acceptance criterion 2
- [ ] Acceptance criterion 3

## 🧩 Sub-tasks (auto-generated for Epics)

When this epic is opened, the Issue Management Automation workflow will automatically create the following sub-tasks:

1. Requirements Analysis
2. Design and Architecture
3. Implementation
4. Testing and Documentation

## 🌍 Impact / Affected Areas

<!-- Which parts of the codebase / API / UX are affected? -->

## ➕ Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context, mockups, or links to related issues. -->

---

*This feature request will follow the Feature Request Process described by the Issue Management Automation workflow.*
